title: If any AI2 researchers want to continue working on open source frontier models, specifically for medical applications, DM me :) At @SophontAI, we believe medical applications are a useful testbed for core frontier research. We are studying fundamental research questions in the domains of self-supervised learning and RL training within the context of clinical use-cases. With @MedARC_AI, we have one of the longest-running open-source AI research communities (since 2023) with an established track record of impactful publications. The environment we have is unlike any other: a great team of AI researchers, sufficient compute, collaborations with various academics, etc. Most importantly the research is impacting real lives for the better!
